description: Develop and maintain mobile applications for users in Indonesia and international markets.
Participate in the full software development lifecycle, including planning, design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance.
Collaborate with product, design, backend, and QA teams to deliver mobile solutions.
Implement features and enhancements based on business and user requirements.
Optimize application performance, usability, and reliability.
Troubleshoot issues and provide ongoing support for existing applications.
Contribute to improving code quality, application stability, and user experience.
Develop and maintain enterprise applications as part of a vendor partnership.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver software solutions aligned with client requirements.
Participate in code reviews, testing, and deployment processes to ensure application quality.

Sewanue (Vav Technologies Indonesia): Managed all aspects of a nearby sports field booking and rental application from planning to deployment, including authentication, order processing, user reviews, and integrating Firebase as the backend.

Omaga (PT Trans Indojek Mahasiswa): Optimized trip management algorithms, financial transactions, and real-time database streaming for an online motorcycle taxi application specifically for students, while implementing real-time communication features and collaborating with cross-functional teams.
TrackThisJob (Coolva's Product): Developed an application to track and record job applications that have been submitted, helping users manage their job search process efficiently.
Crafted a tailored E-commerce application for the University of Lampung, comprising two mobile platforms: UnilaHub Public Apps and UnilaHub Research Apps.
Engaged in all development phases from design to maintenance and publication on the Play Store.
Integrated the system with a concurrently developed RESTful API.
Seamlessly integrated the application with OneSignal and Firebase for providing users with timely notifications.
Incorporated the application with Midtrans Payment Gateway system for seamless payment transactions.
Implemented RajaOngkir API integration for obtaining shipping costs from every available courier in Indonesia and for tracking shipment deliveries.
Designed and developed the academic information portal application for the University of Lampung, accessible to all.
Engaged in every phase of application development, from planning to final implementation, ensuring a high-quality product and superior user experience until it was published on the Play Store.
Took responsibility for all developed features.
Integrated the application with the University of Lampung's REST API to ensure and maintain data authenticity.

experiences.role: Assistant Lecturer of Advance Web Programming
description: Taught advanced web programming using the CodeIgniter 4 framework at the Computer Science Laboratory.
Taught web programming practicum using HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, PHP, and MySQL.
Materials covered: HTML Basic, CSS Basic, Bootstrap, PHP Basic (Variables, Looping, Conditioning, Database Connection and CRUD).

experiences.role: Assistant Lecturer of Object Oriented Programming
description: Taught Object Oriented Programming practicum using the Java programming language at the Computer Science Laboratory.
Materials covered: Class and Object, Variables, Encapsulation, Class Relationship, Inheritance, Polymorphism, Abstract and Interface, Static and Inner Class, Exception Handling, JDBC, and JavaFX.
Taught Structured Programming practicum using the C++ programming language at the Computer Science Laboratory.
